heading: Retired pay base: officers retired in general or flag officer grades
label: 1407a Retired pay base: officers retired in general or flag officer grades
notes: Amendments2014— amended section generally. Prior to amendment section related to retired pay base: officers retired in general or flag officer grades, consisting of subsecs. (a) and (b).Pub. L. 113–291

Effective Date of 2014 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 113–291, div. A, title VI, § 622(b)128 Stat. 3403Dec. 19, 2014“, United States Code, as amended by subsection (a), shall be effective for retired pay that commences after .”Section 1407a of title 10December 31, 2014

children.heading: .—Rates of Basic Pay to Be Used in Determination
children.label: a .—Rates of Basic Pay to Be Used in Determination
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this section, in a case in which the determination under section 1406 or 1407 of this title of the retired pay base applicable to the computation of the retired pay of a covered general or flag officer involves a rate of basic pay payable to that officer for any period between , and , that was subject to a reduction under for such period, such retired-pay-base determination shall be made using the rate of basic pay for such period provided by law, without regard to the reduction under .October 1, 2006December 31, 2014section 203(a)(2) of title 37section 203(a)(2) of title 37

children.heading: 8, 198031, 2014.—Partial Preservation of Computation of Retired Pay Base Using Uncapped Rates of Basic Pay for Covered Officers Who First Became Members Before September, and Whose Retired Pay Commences After December
children.label: b 8, 198031, 2014.—Partial Preservation of Computation of Retired Pay Base Using Uncapped Rates of Basic Pay for Covered Officers Who First Became Members Before September, and Whose Retired Pay Commences After December

children.heading: .—Officers retiring afterdecember 31, 2014
children.label: 1 .—Officers retiring afterdecember 31, 2014
children.text: In the case of a covered general or flag officer who first became a member of a uniformed service before , and who is retired after , under any provision of law other than chapter 1223 of this title or is transferred to the Retired Reserve after , the retired pay base applicable to the computation of the retired pay of that officer shall be determined as provided in paragraph (2) if determination of such retired pay base as provided in that paragraph results in a higher retired pay base than determination of such retired pay base as otherwise provided by law (including the application of ).September 8, 1980December 31, 2014December 31, 2014section 203(a)(2) of title 37

children.heading: .—Alternative determination of retired pay base using uncapped rates of basic pay as ofdecember 31, 2014
children.label: 2 .—Alternative determination of retired pay base using uncapped rates of basic pay as ofdecember 31, 2014
children.text: For a determination in accordance with this paragraph, the amount of an officer’s retired pay base shall be determined by using the rate of basic pay provided as of , for that officer’s grade as of that date for purposes of basic pay, with that officer’s years of service creditable as of that date for purposes of basic pay, and without regard to any reduction under .December 31, 2014section 203(a)(2) of title 37

children.heading: .—Exception for officer retired in a lower grade
children.label: 3 .—Exception for officer retired in a lower grade
children.text: In a case in which the retired grade of the officer is lower than the grade in which the officer was serving on , paragraph (2) shall be applied as if the officer was serving on that date in the officer’s retired grade.December 31, 2014

children.heading: .—Preservation of Computation of Retired Pay Base Using Uncapped Rates of Basic Pay for Officers Transferring to Retired Reserve During Specified Period
children.label: c .—Preservation of Computation of Retired Pay Base Using Uncapped Rates of Basic Pay for Officers Transferring to Retired Reserve During Specified Period
children.text: In the case of a covered general or flag officer who is transferred to the Retired Reserve between , and , and who becomes entitled to receive retired pay under after , the retired pay base applicable to the computation of the retired pay of that officer shall be determined using the rates of basic pay provided by law without regard to any reduction in rates of basic pay under .October 1, 2006December 31, 2014December 31, 2014section 12731 of this titlesection 203(a)(2) of title 37

children.heading: .—Covered General or Flag Officer Defined
children.label: d .—Covered General or Flag Officer Defined

children.text: is retired in a general officer grade or flag officer grade (or an equivalent grade, in the case of an officer of the commissioned corps of the Public Health Service or the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration); or
is transferred to the Retired Reserve in a general officer grade or flag officer grade.
